assessments.name: Image Src Binding
assessments.description: Use NgOptimizedImage with ngSrc for img tags; do not use src or [attr.src] for static or bound image sources.

attemptDetails.reasoning: The user wants me to fix an Angular static analysis violation. The rule is `angular.image-src-binding.attr-src-binding` which detects when `[attr.src]` is used instead of the recommended `[ngSrc]` with `NgOptimizedImage`. According to the rule: 1. I need to add `NgOptimizedImage` to the component's imports 2. Replace `[attr.src]` with `[ngSrc]` on the `` tag Let me look at the files: 1. `src/app/app.ts` - The component TypeScript file 2. `src/app/app.html` - The template file The fix needs to be: 1. In `src/app/app.ts`: Add `NgOptimizedImage` to imports in the component decorator 2. In `src/app/app.html`: Replace `[attr.src]` with `[ngSrc]` Let me make these changes: For `src/app/app.ts`: - Add import for `NgOptimizedImage` from `@angular/common` - Add `imports: [NgOptimizedImage]` to the component decorator For `src/app/app.html`: - Replace `[attr.src]="product?.image"` with `[ngSrc]="product?.image"` Let me write out the full updated files.
